title: Familiar Places - Wonderland
description: "Familiar Places" is a horror-focused modpack, designed to bring back the old aesthetics and functionalities of alpha Minecraft, while also expanding on it's liminal and scary atmosphere with "wonderland.jar".
body:
_**Familiar Places**_ is a lightweight horror-focused modpack, designed to bring back the old aesthetics and functionalities of alpha Minecraft, while also expanding on it's liminal and eerie atmosphere with the great horror mod, "wonderland.jar". Explore the lonely world of early Minecraft and the strange liminal feeling that something is terribly wrong beyond the fog, only this time, it's not just your imagination.
![back in time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cabfae5fa6bdaa7505f35edca1ec45ee25d3876c.png)
This modpack aims to recreate alpha Minecraft as closely as possible.
Changes include:
- Old textures
- Old sound effects.
- Alpha world generation (customizable in world creation)
- Legacy Nether
- Old animations
- Old mob behaviour
- Old mob drops
- No hunger bar (food regenerates hp)
- Old food stacking
- No sprinting
- No sleeping (beds can still be crafted, but their only functionality is the spawnpoint)
- No dual whield/offhand slot
- Most non-alpha structures and mobs removed from naturally spawning
- Old crafting recipes
- Toggleable fog distance (F by default)
- Alpha main menu, with logo animations
- And a lot more

### EVERYTHING CAN BE RE-ENABLED THROUGH THE NOSTALGIC TWEAKS CONFIG SETTINGS!

![in-game screenshot of a forest biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67aca56b3108d64a8b754bc91b4572509723e8d2.png)

![Something's off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/049f9f53cfe9a509d605c3579ebb5b214fb9cb6e.png)
On top of the visual, audio and gameplay tweaks, the horror aspects of this experience are provided by wonderland.jar. Among other things, this mod adds:
- 25 different liminal dimensions, all with their own entrances and escape routes
- 32 unique entities
- Unnatural structures
- Strange noises
- Unnerving messages in chat
- New blocks/mechanics
- Lore pieces to be found

![in-game screenshot of an endless field](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb842ef569bfc825a4c16cf782ce1e4123736da8.png)

This modpack is playable in multiplayer and is made easier by the mod **_e4mc_**, included in the pack.

### SEE THE MAIN MOD/RESOURCE PACK LIST BELOW

**_Mods:_**
- [ wonderland.jar](https://modrinth.com/mod/wonderland-jar) by [alexander.25.k](https://modrinth.com/user/alexander.25.k)

- [Default World Type](https://modrinth.com/mod/defaultworldtype) by [MelanX](https://modrinth.com/user/MelanX)
- [No More Copper Ore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-copper-ore), [No More Glow Lichen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-glow-lichen), [No More Igloos](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-igloos), [No More Modern Crafts](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-modern-crafts), [No More Nether Gold Ore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-nether-gold-ore), [No More Ocean Monuments](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-ocean-monuments), [No More Pillager Outposts](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-pillager-outposts), [No More Ruined Portals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-ruined-portals), [No More Shield](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-shield), [No More Shipwrecks](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-shipwrecks), [No More Stone Variants](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-stone-variants), [No More Swamp Huts](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-swamp-huts), [No More Woodland Mansions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-woodland-mansions) and [No More Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-villages) all by [millennIumAMbiguity](https://modrinth.com/user/millennIumAMbiguity)
- [No Sleep | You May Not Rest](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-sleep-you-may-not-rest) by [moi-tripa](https://modrinth.com/user/moi-tripa)
- [Old Bed Crafting Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/old-bed-crafting-recipe) by [Syhmac](https://modrinth.com/user/Syhmac)
- [Old Ore Drops](https://modrinth.com/mod/oldoredrops) by [JarekThyNerd](https://modrinth.com/user/JarekThyNerd)
- [Yeetus Experimentus](https://modrinth.com/mod/yeetus-experimentus) by [Sunekaer](https://modrinth.com/user/Sunekaer)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811)

**_Resource packs:_**
- [Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) by [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/PoeticRainbow)
- [Golden Days Alpha](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days-alpha) by [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/PoeticRainbow)




**_All mods and resource packs belong to their respective owner, this is only a curated collection designed with both singleplayer and multiplayer in mind._**
